Bodytext.67108945: "" "'Primitives of one type are grouped together in the index buffer\\nWhen creating new primitives of one type they need to be inserted in the correct batch\\n\\nTDInputPrimsStartIndex() / TDPrimsStartIndex() : start index of primitives in current batch, for input and output\\nOutput start indices are based on the primitives created on output page, either through the parameters or through attributes, as in this example, when the number of primitives is known on the GPU\\n\\nTDInputVertsStartIndex() / TDInputVertsStartIndex() : start index of vertices in current batch, for input and output\\n\\nin python\\n.numPrims() has primType keyword and max keyword to return currently allocated primitive of given type\\n.numVerts() has max keyword and LineStrips bool to return number of verts for line strips (implicit for other prim types based on prim type)'"
